TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kusunuki ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 267 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 255 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 85%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%, Puyuma 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kusunuki hya' ga Haitutuan. tay mkyahu' na Kusunuki hya' ga Kamcing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kusunuki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kus~ɕunuki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kus~ɕunuki ħjaʔ ɣa ħaitutuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kus~ɕunuki ħjaʔ ɣa kamʦ~ʨiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kus~ɕunuki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kusunuki ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 267 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 255 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 85%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%, Puyuma 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kusunuki hya' ga Haitutuan. tay mkyahu' na Kusunuki hya' ga Kamcing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kusunuki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kus~ɕunuki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kus~ɕunuki ħjaʔ ɣa ħaitutuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kus~ɕunuki ħjaʔ ɣa kamʦ~ʨiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kus~ɕunuki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
